{# The epub/latex builders use the basic theme (no Furo), so extending "furo/page.html" unconditionally fails there with TemplateNotFound. Only override the Furo HTML build; let other builders use their own page.html. #} {% if builder == "html" or builder == "dirhtml" %} {% extends "furo/page.html" %} {% block body %} {{ super() }} {# Keep the selected sidebar item visible across navigations. Loaded here, right after the sidebar markup (emitted by super() above), so it runs during parse — before first paint — which is what prevents the visible "spin". An external file (not inline) keeps it CSP-friendly. See sidebar-scroll.js. #} {% endblock body %} {% else %} {% extends "!page.html" %} {% endif %}
